examples.atom: I plan to return on July 20
James: I plan to return on July 20, I’ll definitely bring you some kind of souvenir!

method: explicit in-atom date phrases only (month-day[-year] or ISO), resolved against the source record's session anchor; compared by UTC calendar day to claim.valid_at and to EventRecord.start on the same record. Relative phrases excluded -- this measures the EXACT class the fleet flagged and the skeptics split on.
